title: Witherstorm+
description: Witherstorm+ Makes it so you can have the ultimate battle against the most powerful mob.
body: Witherstorm+ gives you the full experience fighting the witherstorm with a little extra stuff! You could fight it the nomal way or you can get guns and try to take down the witherstorm (Vic's point blank). Your structures will be better with Yung's. You also get an upside with vast preformance mods and multiplayer experience. Have Fun!!!!!
